name: Lucent, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview The Company was formed on December 5, 2017 in the State of Nevada as a C corporation. Business Strategy Lucent, Inc. has a wholly owned subsidiary Dijiya Energy Saving Technology, Inc. Lucents mission is to revolutionize the AI datacenter and cloud computing industry by AI applications platform and harnessing the power of clean energy.
